---
title: "Loading Stock Data with Tidyquant"
output: html_notebook
author: Martin Summer
date: 4.10.2021
---

```{r}
library(tidyquant)
```

# Load Standard and Poor 500

```{r}
SP500 <- tq_get("^GSPC", from = "2015-01-01", get = "stock.price")
write.csv(SP500, "../data/sp500.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
stock_data <- tq_get(c("GOOGL","AMZN","FB","AAPL"), from = "2015-01-01", get="stock.prices")
write.csv(stock_data, "../data/stock_prices.csv", row.names = FALSE )
```
